strategy: Everyone joins on Round 1 to dodge the Goat Monk ambush he throws at latecomers.
He is stunable and beguilable, so a stun or Beguile buys you safe setup rounds.
He self-buffs with a protected Lifeblade and Lifespear and throws a protected Ion Wind every third round that can strip your charms; set up and hit inside a Round 1-3 or 4-6 window.
Hit with Death (he takes only +5% but resists everything else as Life 70%); prism if you are off-school.
Stack blades and Feint and burst; his incoming healing is cut 75%, so he cannot out-heal you.
cheatNotes: Latecomers eat a Goat Monk, so have everyone join on Round 1.
Every third round he casts a protected Ion Wind that can strip your blades; land your hit before Round 3 or 6, or rebuild fast after it fires.
